field.title: visible
field.formula:
IF [formname] IS NOT NULL THEN
    TRUE
ELSE
    FALSE
END
field.guid_formula:
IF [formname_6y4o] IS NOT NULL THEN
    TRUE
ELSE
    FALSE
END

field.title: Период
field.formula:
IF [period] = 'День' THEN
    [creation_date]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Месяц' THEN
    datetrunc([creation_date], "month")
END
field.guid_formula:
IF [period] = 'День' THEN
    [creation_date_dtyy]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Месяц' THEN
    datetrunc([creation_date_dtyy], "month")
END

field.title: CRQ
field.formula:
IF COUNTD([crm_id]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual]) / COUNTD([crm_id])
ELSE
    NULL
END
field.guid_formula:
IF COUNTD([crm_id_o407]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual_urgh]) / COUNTD([crm_id_o407])
ELSE
    NULL
END

field.title: CRB
field.formula:
IF SUM([qual]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([booking_event]) / SUM([qual])
ELSE
    NULL
END
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM([qual_urgh]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([booking_event_qdtd]) / SUM([qual_urgh])
ELSE
    NULL
END
